title: Platform screening before seller admission
prompt: A marketplace chooses a screening threshold for new sellers using noisy risk scores. Stricter screening blocks more malicious sellers but also rejects more benign sellers and consumes no downstream review resource. Frame the threshold decision without claiming the score measures true intent perfectly.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: maximize expected platform payoff from admissions and harms
model_specification.mechanism: Noisy scores shift the false-positive and false-negative rates induced by the threshold.

prohibited_inferences: The platform observes malicious intent directly
